name: Locked Workstation
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Alexandr Yampolskyi, SOC Prime
SIGMA Title: Locked Workstation
SIGMA Description: Detects locked workstation session events that occur automatically after a standard period of inactivity.

False positives:
- Likely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4800 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Locked Workstation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4800 AQL filter query
